vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent most of my afternoons exploring the woods behind our house.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn
vocab.example: We used to build fortresses out of cardboard boxes, fueled by our unbridled imagination.

vocab.meaning: tham gia vào các trò chơi đóng vai
vocab.example: My friends and I would often engage in role-play, pretending to be intrepid explorers on a secret mission.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển vô tư lự
vocab.example: Flying kites in the open fields was a carefree pastime that defined my summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: Scrapbooking and finger painting were activities that really helped to foster creativity from a young age.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi một cách năng nổ/hào hứng
vocab.example: The local park was always filled with the sounds of children involved in exuberant play.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo/năng lực về thể chất
vocab.example: I wasn't particularly known for my physical prowess, so I preferred board games over competitive sports.

vocab.meaning: sự ngạc nhiên và tò mò về thế giới
vocab.example: Collecting unusual pebbles and insects gave me a sense of wonder about the natural world.

vocab.meaning: những sở thích kỳ ảo/ngây ngô
vocab.example: Most of our childhood activities were whimsical pursuits, like searching for fairies in the garden.
While I enjoyed group games, reading adventure novels was my favorite solitary endeavor.
